# Mbase Digital

Mbase Digital is a professional digital strategy, website development, search visibility, content strategy, and automation brand.

Positioning:
Mbase Digital combines creativity, logic, research, and technical ability to build fast, useful, search-ready websites and content systems for growth-focused businesses.

Core services:
- Search and AI visibility: technical SEO, content architecture, schema, entity clarity, and answer-ready pages for search engines and LLM-assisted discovery.
- Content strategy and production: audience research, keyword mapping, topical planning, content briefs, service pages, and editorial systems.
- Performance website development: server-rendered Next.js websites with accessibility, responsive design, optimized media, conversion paths, and maintainable code.
- Automation and integrations: lead capture, CRM workflows, analytics, reporting, lead routing, and connected business tools.

Method:
- Research the audience, competitors, search landscape, service economics, and technical constraints.
- Structure navigation, page hierarchy, internal links, and content models for people and crawlers.
- Build server-rendered pages, optimized WebP assets, semantic HTML, metadata, schema, and deployment workflows.
- Improve using analytics, search data, conversion signals, and content gap analysis.

Website standards:
- Server-rendered or statically generated pages for crawlable content.
- Readable semantic HTML with logical headings and accessible navigation.
- Optimized WebP imagery with useful alt text and disciplined file sizes.
- Metadata, Open Graph, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, JSON-LD, and llms.txt.
- Responsive layouts for mobile scanning and desktop comparison.
- Clean code structure prepared for future service pages, case studies, articles, and brand assets.
